mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.source_type, r.source_id, r.trigger_id, r.trigger_task_id, r.state, r.meta, r.run_time, r.task_record_id, r.create_time, r.update_time, CASE WHEN r.source_type = 'APPLICATION' THEN a.name WHEN r.source_type = 'TOOL' THEN t.name ELSE NULL END AS source_name FROM event_trigger_task_record r LEFT JOIN application a ON r.source_type = 'APPLICATION' AND r.source_id = a.id LEFT JOIN tool t ON r.source_type = 'TOOL' AND r.source_id = t.id
r.trigger_id = #{triggerId}
AND r.source_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.sourceType}, '%')
AND r.state LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.state}, '%')
ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
